mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_record ( member_id, record_date, mood_level, mood_memo, sleep_level, sleep_memo, meal_level, meal_memo, exercise_level, exercise_memo, social_level, social_memo ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{recordDate}, #{moodLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moodMemo}, #{sleepLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sleepMemo}, #{mealLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mealMemo}, #{exerciseLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exerciseMemo}, #{socialLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{socialMemo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_record SET mood_level = #{moodLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mood_memo = #{moodMemo}, sleep_level = #{sleepLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sleep_memo = #{sleepMemo}, meal_level = #{mealLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, meal_memo = #{mealMemo}, exercise_level = #{exerciseLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exercise_memo = #{exerciseMemo}, social_level = #{socialLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, social_memo = #{socialMemo} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.select: SELECT daily_record_id AS dailyRecordId, member_id AS memberId, record_date AS recordDate, mood_level AS moodLevel, mood_memo AS moodMemo, sleep_level AS sleepLevel, sleep_memo AS sleepMemo, meal_level AS mealLevel, meal_memo AS mealMemo, exercise_level AS exerciseLevel, exercise_memo AS exerciseMemo, social_level AS socialLevel, social_memo AS socialMemo FROM daily_record WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
